name: Trashlon
description: A sentient trash can that somehow entered the tournament. It smells terrible. Its moves rarely work. Everyone feels a little bad for it.

moves.name: 💫 Feeble Bonk
moves.desc: Weakly bumps into the enemy. Occasionally does something.

moves.name: 💨 Stale Gust
moves.desc: Exhales a puff of truly awful air. May confuse, mostly just stinks.

moves.name: 🪣 Lid Slam
moves.desc: Slams its lid down. Loud, slow, unimpressive.

moves.name: 🍌 Garbage Toss
moves.desc: Hurls rotting debris. May poison. Probably won't.

moves.name: 💊 Pity Heal
moves.desc: Digs through itself and finds a slightly less rotten snack. Restores a little HP.

moves.name: 🥺 Sad Eyes
moves.desc: Stares with hollow desperation. Lowers enemy ATK through sheer pity.
